case_title: JD GLOBAL TRADING COMPANY VS. MARTIN SHIANG et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JD GLOBAL TRADING COMPANY SERVED AUG-06-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONTAI BIOTECH INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA  ZHEN CHENG TRADING CO.
